services.name: App Service
services.description: Web front end for document upload, status tracking, and search experience

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Serverless orchestration for OCR, summarization, indexing, and metadata persistence

services.name: Document Intelligence
services.description: Extracts OCR text, structure, and document fields from uploaded files

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Generates concise document summaries from extracted text

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Indexes extracted content and summaries for full-text search and retrieval

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Stores document metadata, processing status, and summary references

services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Retains original documents and derived artifacts in blob storage

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Authenticates users accessing the document processing application

services.name: Key Vault
services.description: Stores API secrets, connection strings, and encryption-sensitive configuration

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects platform metrics and application telemetry from the processing layer

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Central workspace for queryable logs, diagnostics, and operational analysis

connections.label: Authenticate document users and enforce sign-in policies
Submit uploaded document for processing workflow
Retrieve AI service secrets and data store connection settings
Persist original document and generated artifacts to blob retention
Invoke OCR and field extraction on retained document
Generate business summary from extracted document text
Write document metadata, processing status, and summary pointers
Push searchable content, OCR text, and summary into index
Execute document search and retrieve ranked results
Read document metadata and processing state for user display
Emit pipeline telemetry, failures, and execution metrics
Store consolidated logs and metrics for troubleshooting queries

workflow.description: A user signs in and uploads a document through the web application.
The orchestration layer loads secrets and stores the original file in blob retention.
The stored document is sent for OCR and structured extraction.
Extracted text is summarized into a concise business-friendly synopsis.
Document metadata, status, and summary references are persisted for application lookup.
OCR text and generated summaries are indexed for full-text discovery.
Users search the corpus and view document details with metadata enrichment.
Processing telemetry is centralized for operations and troubleshooting.

metadata.prompt: An intelligent document processing pipeline with Azure AI Document Intelligence for OCR, Azure OpenAI for summarization, Cognitive Search for indexing, Cosmos DB for metadata, and Blob Storage for document retention
